title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Ahmedabad

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Ahmedabad
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
